title: Spicy Peruvian Cheese Fritters
description: A crispy Indian-inspired snack combining the heat of Peruvian peppers with the creaminess of cheese.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
In a large bowl, combine the gram flour, shredded cheese, taco seasoning, baking powder, and salt.
Add the chopped Peruvian peppers and mix well.
Add water as needed to form a thick batter.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes on each side.
Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve hot with your favorite chutney or sauce.
